data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of your Seerr server.
data_description.port: Port your Seerr server listens on (default 5055).
data_description.api_key: API key from Seerr → Settings → General.
data_description.ssl: Enable if your server uses HTTPS.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the server. Check the host and port.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please verify your credentials.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Seerr server is already configured.
